appearance.unknown_name: a tall woman in practical leather armor
appearance.description: A tall, athletic woman with silver-streaked hair and piercing blue eyes. She wears practical leather armor and carries an elegant longsword at her hip. Her posture speaks of years of disciplined training.

facts: I am a master of the sword. I can teach you the ancient techniques of bladesmanship.
Each technique requires dedication and practice to master.
Draw Cut teaches precision. Riposte teaches counter-attack. Perfect Cut teaches armor penetration.
Come to me when you are ready to learn, and I will set you on the path.
To learn Draw Cut, you must prove your skill with accumulated sword damage.
To learn Riposte, you must demonstrate versatility against many foes.
To learn Perfect Cut, you must show patience and precision.
To learn Whirlwind, you must prove your mastery in chaotic combat.

conversation.first_greeting: the tall woman nods respectfully, her hand resting lightly on her sword hilt. 'I am Seraphina, Blade of the Guild. Master of the sword arts. What brings you here?'
conversation.greeting: Seraphina nods respectfully, her hand resting lightly on her sword hilt. 'I am Seraphina, master of the blade. What brings you to the guild?'
conversation.farewell: She gives a slight bow. 'Train hard, and the blade will serve you well.'
